strengths: Active hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and frameworks supporting agentic workflows at re:cinq
Direct fintech exposure at RIDE Capital (German investment platform) and Optilyz pricing systems, plus high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second
Founder of GISCollective, an event-driven platform on Kubernetes, demonstrating long-term ownership of architecture, observability, and production operations across a polyglot stack
concerns: Resume does not explicitly document scaling an engineering org from 10 to 30+ or formal executive leadership titles
Limited explicit mention of LLM evaluation pipelines, fine-tuning methodology, or LangGraph-specific production deployments
No stated experience governing outsourced/hybrid engineering delivery partners

key_factors.factor: Agentic AI and MCP framework experience
Distributed systems and real-time backend depth

response.justification: Bogdan combines rare current-stack agentic AI work (MCP generators, agent frameworks at re:cinq) with deep distributed-systems credentials from Dunnhumby's millions-of-requests-per-second microservices and a founder-built event-driven platform running on Kubernetes. He has shipped in regulated fintech contexts at RIDE Capital using disciplined TDD/CI/CD trunk-based practices, and has sustained 15+ years of polyglot delivery across backend, real-time, and data-heavy systems. The blend of craft, agent infrastructure, fintech exposure, and demonstrated teaching/leadership through workshops and open-source ownership positions him as a credible candidate to architect a modular, model-agnostic agentic platform and build the engineering culture this CTO role demands.
